statements.query: MATCH (v:SpotlightVulnerability) WHERE v.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH v LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (v)
MATCH (:SpotlightVulnerability)<-[hv:HAS_VULNERABILITY]-(:CrowdstrikeHost) WHERE hv.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH hv LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (hv)
statements.__comment__: Delete relationship between vulnerabilty and host if host exists and vulnerabilty does not
